Variables.Name: TransitionScreenSize
Variables.Description: The screen radius an mesh object should reach before swapping to the LOD actor, once one of parent displays, it won't draw any of children.

Variables.Name: bSimplifyMesh
Variables.Description:
If this is true, it will simplify mesh but it is slower.
	 If false, it will just merge actors but not simplify using the lower LOD if exists.
	 For example if you build LOD 1, it will use LOD 1 of the mesh to merge actors if exists.
	 If you merge material, it will reduce drawcalls.

Variables.Name: ProxySetting
Variables.Description: Simplification Setting if bSimplifyMesh is true

Variables.Name: MergeSetting
Variables.Description: Merge Mesh Setting if bSimplifyMesh is false

Variables.Name: DesiredBoundRadius
Variables.Description: Desired Bounding Radius for clustering - this is not guaranteed but used to calculate filling factor for auto clustering

Variables.Name: DesiredFillingPercentage
Variables.Description: Desired Filling Percentage for clustering - this is not guaranteed but used to calculate filling factor  for auto clustering

Variables.Name: MinNumberOfActorsToBuild
Variables.Description: Min number of actors to build LODActor

Variables.Name: bOnlyGenerateClustersForVolumes
Variables.Description: Min number of actors to build LODActor

Variables.Name: bReusePreviousLevelClusters
Variables.Description: Will reuse the clusters generated for the previous (lower) HLOD level
